payload.notes: Use rustix RawMode, pin Rust 1.97.0, and run fmt/clippy before long phase proofs without weakening validation.
payload.summary: Repair Linux Clippy 1.97 portability and make premerge toolchain deterministic and fast-failing

payload.evidence: CI maintenance slice: Rust 1.97.0 Clippy passes with native RawMode; premerge toolchain pin and fail-fast ordering are covered by the release workflow contract; workspace tests, Phase 3, Phase 6 framework, and docs checks pass.

payload.actions_taken: ["used isolated Harness intake","changed custody helpers to native RawMode","pinned premerge Rust 1.97.0","moved fmt and Clippy before long proofs","added compact workflow assertions","ran exact-toolchain and phase validation"]
payload.errors: ["root bootstrap rejected legacy Symphony-owned stories","story update JSON mode could not combine evidence with CAS","initial cargo fmt check found one standard line wrap"]
payload.harness_friction: Root bootstrap remains unusable because harness.db contains Symphony-owned state, so the documented isolated planning database was required; recording the required intake also required two phase-boundary allowlist entries.
payload.notes: Normal maintenance slice; no validation was removed and Phase 7 acceptance remains blocked.
payload.task_summary: Fixed Rust 1.97 premerge portability and fail-fast validation
